debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
inst✝ : TopologicalSpace α
x : α
p p' q q' : α → Prop
hT : {x | p x} ∈ nhds x
hT' : {x | p' x} ∈ nhds x
hS : {x | q x} ∈ nhds x
hS' : {x | q' x} ∈ nhds x
⊢ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ nhds x

proof: filter_upwards [hT, hT', hS, hS'] with a hp hp' hq hq' using Or.inl ⟨hp, hq⟩
